nav.slogan: Time is precious, just like you

slides.title: Need a motorcycle taxi in Paris? Available in less than 10 minutes.
slides.subtitle: A premium service available 24/7, with guaranteed fixed fares, VMDTR-certified drivers, and instant booking.

slides.title: Executive Fleet
slides.subtitle: Travel in comfort and elegance. Our professional chauffeurs will accompany you everywhere, whether for business meetings or private trips.

pricing.title: Fixed & Transparent Rates
pricing.subtitle: Zero surprises on the price
pricing.description: No extra charge at night, on weekends, on public holidays or in case of traffic. Price fixed upon booking.

reservation.inquiries_text: For any inquiries, please feel free to write to us.
reservation.subtitle: Book a ride in seconds!

footer.description: Strategy, design, and technology to accelerate business growth.

errors.submit_failed: Submission failed. Please try again later.

contact_form.success: Thanks! We will get back to you shortly.

services_page.hero_subtitle: Available 24/7 for all your journeys in Paris and Île-de-France.
services_page.speed_flexibility_text_1: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, Jay’s Taxi Moto supports you for all your trips in Paris and the Île-de-France region.
services_page.speed_flexibility_text_2: We provide a professional, punctual, and secure service, designed to save you time while ensuring exceptional comfort and impeccable hygiene.
services_page.speed_flexibility_text_3: Our drivers have a perfect command of urban traffic, ensuring a smooth, safe, and stress-free journey — even during peak hours.
services_page.speed_flexibility_text_4: MotoTaxi is the fastest solution for business appointments, train station and airport transfers, or urgent travel in Paris.
services_page.maintenance_title: Rigorous vehicle maintenance for optimal safety
services_page.maintenance_text: Safety is our top priority. We adhere to strict maintenance schedules for all our vehicles to ensure they are always in perfect condition. Every motorcycle undergoes regular inspections of brakes, tires, lights, and engine performance.
services_page.luggage_text_1: A luggage option is available for transporting baggage in the trunk up to 25 kg, with a €20 supplement added to the ride fare.
services_page.luggage_text_2: Please specify this option in the comments section when making your reservation.
services_page.parcel_text_1: We also provide parcel and document delivery services, available upon quotation.
services_page.parcel_text_2: Our delivery service guarantees fast, secure handling, tailored to your needs, for both individuals and professionals.
services_page.passport_title: 1. Forgot your passport and already arrived at the airport? A quick and reliable solution
services_page.passport_text: In the event of a forgotten passport or important document, our driver can intervene quickly to retrieve it from your home, hotel, or any other location, and deliver it to you as soon as possible. This service allows you to avoid any last-minute stress and travel with peace of mind, even in the event of unforeseen circumstances.
services_page.visit_paris_subtitle: Visit Paris by motorcycle with a driver – freedom and time saving
services_page.visit_paris_text: Enjoy a unique experience to discover Paris with our chauffeured motorcycle service. Ideal for avoiding traffic jams and optimizing your travel, this service allows you to move easily between the different iconic sites of the capital. Flexible and personalized, it adapts to your schedule for a smooth, comfortable, and original visit.
services_page.cta_subtitle: Experience the fastest and most comfortable way to travel in Paris.

contact_page.hero_subtitle: We are here to help you 24/7. Reach out to us for any inquiries.
contact_page.questions_title: Questions? Need help? Our team is ready to answer you.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle:
Airport Transfers: CDG Roissy, Orly and Le Bourget. Free waiting time and real-time flight tracking. Service available 24/7.

Parisian train stations: Gare du Nord, Gare de Lyon, Montparnasse, Gare de l'Est, Saint-Lazare. Free waiting time if delayed.

Paris Transfer: Home, office, hotel or business meeting. Paris and inner suburbs, with fixed price.

airports.title: Airport Transfers
airports.desc: CDG Roissy, Orly, Le Bourget. Free waiting time, real-time flight tracking. Available 24/7.

stations.title: Parisian train stations
stations.desc: Gare du Nord, Gare de Lyon, Montparnasse, Gare de l'Est, Saint-Lazare. Free waiting time if delayed.

paris.title: Transfer Paris to Paris
paris.desc: Home, office, hotel, business meeting. Paris (within the city limits) and inner suburbs. Fixed price.

testimonials.title: Client Stories
testimonials.subtitle: What our riders say about their journey.

items.quote: An absolute lifesaver! I skipped the rush hour traffic and made it to my flight at CDG with time to spare. Professional and safe.
items.author: Fabien.

items.quote: The most efficient way to get around Paris. The driver was punctual, the equipment was clean, and the ride was surprisingly comfortable.
items.author: Jerome.

items.quote: Professional service from start to finish. Booking was easy, and the driver navigated the streets expertly. Highly reduced my daily commute stress.
items.author: Karin

passport.hero_title: Forgotten Passport? We've Got You Covered.
passport.hero_subtitle: Fast and reliable document retrieval service — so you never miss your flight.
passport.content_text: Left your passport at home before an important flight? Our driver can intervene quickly to collect your passport or any essential document from your home, hotel, or any location in Paris and Île-de-France, and deliver it to you promptly so you can travel with complete peace of mind.
features: Rapid dispatch — driver on the way in minutes
Collection from any address in Paris & Île-de-France
Available 24/7, every day of the year
Real-time tracking and direct driver contact
Discreet, professional, and fully insured service
passport.cta_subtitle: Don't panic — call or WhatsApp us right now and we'll sort it out.

visit_paris.hero_subtitle: A unique, flexible way to explore the French capital with a professional guide-driver.
visit_paris.content_text: Experience Paris like never before — weaving through iconic boulevards, discovering hidden gems, and reaching every landmark without the hassle of traffic or parking. Our flexible moto-taxi tour service puts you in control, with personalised routes tailored to your interests.
features: Iconic landmarks: Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, Montmartre & more
No traffic jams — explore at your own pace
Available for individuals, couples, and small groups
visit_paris.cta_subtitle: Contact us via WhatsApp or phone and we'll build your perfect Paris itinerary.
